Class AppUtils

java.lang.Object
com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.utils.AppUtils
public class AppUtils extends Object
Shared utility methods and application-wide constants.

Contains:

  • Application window dimension constants
  • Time and duration formatting helpers
  • JavaFX dialog construction helpers
  • Error display helper
  • Album art ImageView builder
  • Structured error logging

  • Method Details

    • scale

      public static double scale(double value)

    • rightPanelPrefWidth

      public static double rightPanelPrefWidth()
      Returns a right-panel preferred width scaled to the screen. Replaces the raw APP_WIDTH * 0.25 calls scattered across controllers. Clamped so it never becomes unreasonably wide on an ultrawide monitor.

    • formatRelativeTime

      public static String formatRelativeTime(LocalDateTime time)
